ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION, CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2003, GRANTED SUBJECT TO WRITTEN ORDER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT REACHED. THE EXECUTORS WILL PAY MADELINE CABADING $171.32 FOR REIMBURSEMENT OR PROPERTY TAX AND $616.36 FOR BALANCE OF FUNERAL COST. NORMAN AGREES TO SEND THE FAMILY PHOTOS TO MR. CARIGNAN'S OFFICE FOR ANTHONY TO CHOSE. THE SURVIVING SPOUSE AGREES TO THE DIVISION OF THE COINS. THE EXECUTOR'S FEES IS REDUCED BY $9,000.00. OBJECTIONS TO THE ACCOUNTING ARE WAIVED. MR. PARKER WILL PREPARE THE ORDER TO BE APPROVED AS TO FORM.

calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lane Parker for and with Dennis & Norman Ubungen (Co-Executors). Charlene Johnson and Joseph Carignan for and with Madeline Cabading and Anthony Ubungen (Objectors).

The parties reported that they had reached a settlement agreement that the co-executors will pay Madeline Cabading $171.32 for reimbursement or property tax and $616.36 for balance of the funeral cost, that Norman agrees to send the family photos to Mr. Carignan's office for Anthony to chose, that the surviving spouse agrees to the division of the coins and the co-executors' fee is reduced by $9,000.00. Objections to the accounting are waived. Mr. Parker will prepare the order to be approved as to form.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
